name: investo
description: Analyze companies (India-first NSE/BSE + global): financials, ratios, peers, DCF, moat, risk, news and a 0-100 rating.
long_description: Investo is an MCP server that, given a company name or ticker, gathers public financial data and produces a full investment analysis: profile & sector, financial statements and ratios, a competitor comparison, DCF intrinsic value, economic moat, risk, management, recent news, SWOT seeds and a balanced 0-100 rating. Primary focus: Indian companies listed on NSE (.NS) and BSE (.BO); US/global supported too. Research/education only — not investment advice.

alphavantage_api_key.title: Alpha Vantage API key
alphavantage_api_key.description: Optional — enables licensed fundamentals (primary source when set).

tools.name: search_company
tools.description: Resolve a name to an NSE/BSE/global ticker

tools.name: get_financials
tools.description: Income statement / balance sheet / cash flow

tools.name: dcf_valuation
tools.description: Intrinsic value, margin of safety, expected return

tools.name: buffett_checklist
tools.description: Weighted Buffett quality checklist (0-100) with reasons, confidence & trend

tools.name: shareholding_pattern
tools.description: Promoter/FII/DII/public split + pledge, QoQ observations & signal

tools.name: growth_outlook
tools.description: 5-year growth engine: ranked drivers, catalysts, blended band

tools.name: investment_thesis
tools.description: Pros/cons, quality grade, valuation stance & verdict

tools.name: technical_snapshot
tools.description: Price/momentum context: DMAs, RSI, volatility, drawdown, beta (not a signal)

tools.name: dcf_sensitivity
tools.description: Intrinsic value across a discount-rate x terminal-growth grid + implied break-even growth

tools.name: compare_companies
tools.description: Head-to-head across 2-6 named tickers (not a curated peer group)

tools.name: peer_group_directory
tools.description: List the curated peer groups and their members

tools.name: export_report
tools.description: Render a full analysis to an HTML or PDF file (writes a file)
